heading: Librarian of Congress: reports
label: 1326 Librarian of Congress: reports
text: Five thousand copies of the annual and special reports of the Librarian of Congress submitted to Congress, shall be printed and bound in cloth for the Library of Congress.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesBased on 44 U.S. Code, 1964 ed., § 156 (, No. 8, ).Feb. 24, 190433 Stat. 583
